steps.title: Identify what the notes say both concepts share
steps.content: The notes explicitly state that mass fraction indicates “the relative abundance of chromium on Earth” and mole fraction likewise indicates “the relative abundance of chromium on Earth.” Both measures reveal the same underlying information—relative abundance—despite using different metrics (total mass vs. total atom count).

steps.title: Select the choice that unites the concepts
steps.content:
Choice B states “both indicate the relative abundance of elements on Earth,” which is precisely the similarity the question asks for.

The other choices either fail to identify any connection (A), misdefine mole fraction (C), or emphasize differences over similarity (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
